# Claude Notes

## Candidate extraction targets

- Concept: IL-42 mediated CD8 suppression
- Entity: IL-42
- Entity: granzyme B
- Entity: Jurkat cells
- Method: flow cytometry activation assay

## Notes for review

- The paper is about **effector suppression**, not complete T-cell inactivation.
- Granzyme B is the cleanest mechanistic hook because it changes more strongly than CD69.
- The Jurkat result looks secondary. It is useful context, but probably not the main concept note.
- Contact independence belongs in caveats or mechanism framing unless another paper confirms it.
